assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions testing on dev clusters first and includes timeline with Rapid channel upgrading before prod clusters

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes Autopilot-specific section mentioning no node management, unsupported workloads, and resource allocation considerations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes checking deprecated APIs with reference to Kubernetes deprecation guide

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Autopilot-specific section mentions resource quotas and compute classes, and checking workload resource requests/limits

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes Pod Disruption Budgets and health checks (readiness/liveness probes)

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes 'gcloud container clusters describe [CLUSTER_NAME]' command

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade includes deployment readiness checks, pod status validation, and application endpoint testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends testing on dev clusters first and includes timeline showing dev testing before prod upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeframe
Includes monitoring dashboards, alerting setup, and post-upgrade monitoring validation items

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, appropriately focusing on Autopilot's managed nature
